name: Bali
description: Discover the tropical paradise of Bali, famous for its forested volcanic mountains, iconic rice paddies, pristine beaches, and stunning coral reefs. A world-class destination for romance and nature lovers.

name: Paris
description: Paris, France's capital, is a major European city and a global center for art, fashion, gastronomy, and culture. Its 19th-century cityscape is crisscrossed by wide boulevards and the River Seine.

name: Manali
description: Manali is a high-altitude Himalayan resort town in the northern Himachal Pradesh state. A backpacker and adventure-lover's paradise with snow-capped peaks, river rapids, and lush valleys.

name: Kerala
description: Kerala, a state on India's tropical Malabar Coast, has nearly 600km of Arabian Sea shoreline. Known for its palm-lined beaches, serene backwaters, lush hill stations, and world-class Ayurvedic treatments.

name: Tokyo
description: Tokyo, Japan's dynamic capital, seamlessly blends ultramodern and traditional — neon-lit skyscrapers alongside historic temples. A food, fashion, and technology lover's dream destination.

name: Goa
description: Goa is a state in western India with coastlines stretching along the Arabian Sea. Famed for its world-class beaches, Portuguese heritage architecture, vibrant nightlife, water sports, and fresh seafood.

name: Delhi
description: Delhi, India's capital, is a historic city offering a blend of ancient heritage and modern life. Explore grand monuments like Qutub Minar, Red Fort, India Gate, and Humayun's Tomb.

name: Triund Trek
description: Triund is a serene trekking destination near Dharamshala, Himachal Pradesh. Situated at the foot of the Dhauladhar range, it offers spectacular views of snow-capped peaks and the Kangra Valley.

name: Hampta Pass
description: Hampta Pass in Himachal Pradesh is a breathtaking crossover trek from the lush green valleys of Kullu to the stark, semi-arid mountains of Lahaul and Spiti.

name: Chandrashila Trek
description: Chandrashila is the summit of the Tungnath ridge in Uttarakhand, housing the highest Shiva temple in the world. It offers a majestic 360-degree view of Himalayan peaks like Nanda Devi and Trishul.

name: Munich
description: Munich, the capital of Bavaria, is famous for its beautiful architecture, vibrant cultural festivals, royal parks, and close proximity to the stunning Bavarian Alps and Neuschwanstein Castle.

name: Vancouver
description: Vancouver is a bustling west coast seaport in British Columbia, renowned for its majestic mountain backdrops, pristine coastlines, and outdoor adventures in the Canadian Rockies.

name: Sydney
description: Sydney, capital of New South Wales and one of Australia's largest cities, is best known for its Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, sandy beaches, and spectacular coastal walks.
